THEVALKYRIE-STRIKE_VALKYRIE.title: Strike
THEVALKYRIE-DEFEND_VALKYRIE.title: Defend
THEVALKYRIE-MAKE_IT_BLEED.title: Make it Bleed
THEVALKYRIE-SHIELD_OF_FAITH.title: Shield of Faith
THEVALKYRIE-CUT_APART.title: Cut Apart
THEVALKYRIE-DIVINE_INSPIRATION.title: Divine Inspiration
THEVALKYRIE-STRENUOUS_PARRY.title: Strenuous Parry
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE.title: Balanced Strike
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Do not [gold]Overexert[/gold] this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-SANCTUARY.title: Sanctuary
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_BATTLE.title: Song of Battle
THEVALKYRIE-SHRIEK.title: Shriek
THEVALKYRIE-SHRIEK.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Overexertion[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THEVALKYRIE-TENDERIZE.title: Tenderize
THEVALKYRIE-JOIN_THE_FRAY.title: Join the Fray
THEVALKYRIE-JUMP_AHEAD.title: Jump Ahead
THEVALKYRIE-CONFUSE.title: Confuse
THEVALKYRIE-QUICK_PUNCH.title: Quick Punch
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN.title: Church Hymn
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].\n|}At the start of your turn, [gold]Overexert[/gold] 3 and add 1 [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-BULLRUSH.title: Bullrush
THEVALKYRIE-BULLRUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this didn't kill an enemy, [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-PRELUDE.title: Prelude
THEVALKYRIE-PRELUDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-CHARGING_TARGE.title: Charging Targe
THEVALKYRIE-CHARGING_TARGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
THEVALKYRIE-BIRDBRAIN.title: Birdbrain
THEVALKYRIE-BIRDBRAIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] }card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-PREPARE_SERMON.title: Prepare Sermon
THEVALKYRIE-PREPARE_SERMON.description: If you have no [gold]Smites[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Quantity:diff()} [gold]Smites[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-SHARPEN.title: Sharpen
THEVALKYRIE-SHARPEN.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a card to add [purple]Sanguine[/purple] [blue]{BleedPower:diff()}[/blue] to.
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT.title: Burn Bright
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT.description:
Lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Lose {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-RAIN_OF_FEATHERS.title: Rain of Feathers
THEVALKYRIE-RAIN_OF_FEATHERS.description: Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Hits:diff()} times.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE.title: Crusade
THEVALKYRIE-CHOP_UP.title: Chop Up
THEVALKYRIE-TAKE_RISKS.title: Take Risks
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_PROTECTION.title: Song of Protection
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_PROTECTION.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
Add a [purple]Nimble {Nimble:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-CAW_CAW.title: CAW CAW!
THEVALKYRIE-GO_FOR_THE_KILL.title: Go for the Kill
THEVALKYRIE-GO_FOR_THE_KILL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
THEVALKYRIE-RUSTED_DAGGER.title: Rusted Dagger
THEVALKYRIE-RUSTED_DAGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-HEAVY_ARMOR.title: Heavy Armor
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS.title: Razor Wings
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] back.
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_DESTRUCTION.title: Song of Destruction
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_DESTRUCTION.descript:
Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold].
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
Add a [purple]Sanguine {Sanguine:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-DIG_YOUR_HEELS_IN.title: Dig Your Heels In
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_SAFETY.title: Song of Safety
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_SAFETY.description:
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
Add {Quantity:diff()} [purple]Aegis {Aegis:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Smites[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE.title: Pull a Muscle
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For the rest of the fight, [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()} at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-EAGLE_DIVE.title: Eagle Dive
THEVALKYRIE-EAGLE_DIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for every 5 [gold]Overexertion[/gold] you currently have.
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM.title: Angel Form
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM.description:
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {AngelFormPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold].
Your [gold]Smites[/gold] gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-DEEPEST_CUTS.title: Deepest Cuts
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_DIVINITY.title: Song of Divinity
THEVALKYRIE-UNLEASH.title: Unleash
THEVALKYRIE-UNLEASH.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Overexertion[/gold] to ALL enemies, then lose all your [gold]Overexertion[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THEVALKYRIE-HAEMORRHAGE.title: Haemorrhage
THEVALKYRIE-PERFECT_YOUR_STANCE.title: Perfect Your Stance
THEVALKYRIE-PERFECT_YOUR_STANCE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this dealt unblocked damage, gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-REQUIEM.title: Requiem
THEVALKYRIE-REQUIEM.description: Play every [gold]Smite[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] on the enemy.{InCombat:\n(Plays {CalculatedSmites:diff()} [gold]{CalculatedSmites:plural:Smite|Smites}[/gold], including {CalculatedEnchantedSmites:diff()} [purple]Enchanted[/purple].)|}
THEVALKYRIE-INQUISITION.title: Inquisition
THEVALKYRIE-INQUISITION.description: Your [gold]Smites[/gold] are created Upgraded{IfUpgraded:show: and randomly [purple]Enchanted[/purple]. Already [purple]Enchanted[/purple] [gold]Smites[/gold] get stronger}.
THEVALKYRIE-DESPERATE_HOUR.title: Desperate Hour
THEVALKYRIE-DESPERATE_HOUR.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 randomly [purple]Enchanted[/purple] [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-SPIKED_PAULDRONS.title: Spiked Pauldrons
THEVALKYRIE-ZEAL.title: Zeal
THEVALKYRIE-ZEAL.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.\nDraw, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] and [purple]Enchant[/purple] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Already [purple]Enchanted[/purple] cards get stronger.
THEVALKYRIE-STRENGTH_IN_HARDSHIP.title: Strength In Hardship
THEVALKYRIE-SMITE.title: Smite
THEVALKYRIE-MAKE_IT_DIE.title: Make it Die
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE.title: Exsanguinating Force
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE.descrip: At the start of your turn, apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEVALKYRIE-HALLOWED_AURA.title: Hallowed Aura
THEVALKYRIE-ROUSING_SOLO.title: Rousing Solo
THEVALKYRIE-ROUSING_SOLO.description:
All your allies draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
You [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
